channel.title: Maxim Autos — Vehicle Inventory
channel.description: Used vehicles for sale at Maxim Autos in Skokie, IL 60077. Phone +18475108947.

item.g:title: 2019 Hyundai Tucson SE AWD
item.g:description: 2019 Hyundai Tucson SE 4WD, 70,524 miles, champagne metallic on beautiful light beige leather interior. Good on gas for an all wheel drive SUV, with up to 25 mpg on the highway.The Tucson SE brings premium safety and tech into an affordable, easy to own compact SUV, which is why it punches above its price. The right size for the city, comfortable and quiet on the highway, and simple to park, it makes a smart daily driver for the North Shore.What sets the SE apart is how much comes standard. Hyundai's safety suite includes Forward Collision Avoidance Assist with automatic emergency braking, Lane Keeping Assist, and Driver Attention Warning, so the tech is watching the road with you. The 7 inch touchscreen runs Apple CarPlay and Android Auto with Bluetooth, and you also get 17 inch alloy wheels, automatic headlights, a backup camera, and a 60/40 split folding rear seat for flexible cargo space. Power comes from a 2.0 liter four cylinder with 161 horsepower and a smooth 6 speed automatic EPA 25mpg. The ride soaks up rough roads, the cabin stays quiet, and Hyundai's strong reliability reputation means it just keeps going.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3 month Peace of Mind warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsSkokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Power Door Locks,Alarm System,4-Cyl 2.0 Liter,Backup Camera,Hill Start Assist Control,Traction Control,Power Windows,Alloy Wheels,ABS (4-Wheel),Power Steering,Bluetooth Wireless,Electronic Stability Control,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Cruise Control,Rear Spoiler,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,Dual Air Bags,Lane Keeping Assist,Keyless Entry,AM/FM Stereo,Automatic 6-Spd w/Shiftronic,AWD,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Air Conditioning,Side Air Bags

item.g:title: 2021 Hyundai Venue SE FWD
item.g:description: 2021 Hyundai Venue SE with just 51,100 miles, a fuel efficient 1.6L engine, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and a backup camera. White on a black cloth interior with a smooth automatic. A practical, easy to park compact SUV that is light on gas and loaded with the tech most buyers actually use every day. Great on gas too, returning up to 33 mpg on the highway, so your daily driving stays cheap.Key features: Fuel efficient 1.6L engine, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, backup camera, alloy wheels, lane departure warning, cruise control, Bluetooth, and power windows and locks. At just over 51,000 miles this is a genuinely low mileage 2021 that slips into tight city parking while still giving you the higher seating position and cargo room of an SUV. An ideal first car, commuter, or second vehicle for the family.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3 Month Peace of Mind Warranty, with extended coverage availableMetal plates issued same day so you can drive home todayTransparent pricing with no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call us to set up a time to see this Hyundai.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2016 Audi Q5 2.0T Premium Plus
item.g:description: 2016 Audi Q5 2.0T Premium Plus luxury German engineering in black with beige leather. quattro all-wheel drive, turbocharged 2.0T performance, and the premium fit-and-finish that puts Audi a class above most compact SUVs. Good on gas for a luxury AWD SUV, with up to 28 mpg on the highway.Premium Plus trim includes panoramic sunroof, heated leather seats, Audi MMI navigation, Bose audio, blind-spot monitoring, power liftgate, and 19-inch alloy wheels. A confident Chicago winter cruiser that still delivers refined daily driving when the snow melts.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3-Month 'Peace of Mind' Warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on-the-spot drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago corridor. Call or visit for a same-day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2015 Honda Civic SE
item.g:description: 2015 Honda Civic SE Sedan, 116,719 miles, all black inside and out. The SE was Honda's Special Edition, slotted right between the base LX and the higher EX, and it is the trim Civic shoppers hunt for. It bundles roughly $1,100 in added equipment over the LX, which is why clean SE models hold value and move fast. Easy on gas, easy to drive, a perfect first car or daily commuter for the North Shore.The standout is Honda LaneWatch. Flip your right turn signal and a camera in the passenger mirror shows your entire blind spot on the 7 inch touchscreen, so lane changes feel a lot safer. That same screen runs Display Audio with Bluetooth and smartphone integration, plus a backup camera. The SE also adds automatic climate control, cruise control, push button start, smart entry, USB input, and alloy wheels. Under the hood is Honda's proven 1.8 liter four cylinder paired with a smooth automatic CVT and front wheel drive, EPA rated 30 city and 39 highway. These engines routinely run past 200,000 miles on basic maintenance, so at 116,719 miles this one is barely broken in, and the 2015 Civic earned an IIHS Top Safety Pick.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3 month Peace of Mind warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsSkokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Traction Control,Power Door Locks,Stability Control,Keyless Entry,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,AM/FM Stereo,Automatic CVT,Power Steering,LaneWatch Blind-Spot,ABS (4-Wheel),Bluetooth Wireless,Air Conditioning,Alloy Wheels,Daytime Running Lights,Side Air Bags,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,FWD,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Cruise Control,Backup Camera,Power Windows,4-Cyl i-VTEC 1.8 Liter,Dual Air Bags,Alarm System

item.g:title: 2016 Nissan Pathfinder SL 4WD
item.g:description: 2016 Nissan Pathfinder SL 4WD only 63,140 miles. Brown exterior with cream interior. Clean title. Powerful 3.5L V6, smooth automatic transmission, and full-time 4-wheel drive built for Chicago winters and Midwest summer road trips alike. Roomy three row SUV that still does up to 26 mpg on the highway, solid for its size.Loaded SL trim features include heated leather seats, dual-zone climate control, panoramic moonroof, Bose premium audio, navigation, rearview camera, power liftgate, 18-inch alloy wheels, and 3-row seating for 7. Excellent family hauler with full towing capability.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3-Month 'Peace of Mind' Warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on-the-spot drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago corridor. Visit or call for a same-day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2015 Volvo XC60 2015.5 T6 R-Design Platinum
item.g:description: 2015 Volvo XC60 T6 R-Design Platinum 325 HP Turbo, AWD, Paddle Shifters, Harman Kardon Audio, Panoramic Sunroof, Navigation, Adaptive Cruise Control, Full Safety Package. Gray on black, automatic, 3.0L Turbo. A Scandinavian performance crossover that looks refined and drives like a sports car 0 to 60 in roughly 6 seconds. Surprisingly easy on gas for a 325 horsepower all wheel drive performance SUV, returning up to 24 mpg on the highway.Key features: turbocharged 3.0L inline-six with 325 HP and 365 lb-ft of torque, all wheel drive, paddle shifters, R-Design sport package with 20-inch alloy wheels, aggressive front grille, rear diffuser and dual exhausts, sport leather seats with heat front and rear, heated steering wheel, panoramic sunroof, Harman Kardon 12-speaker premium audio, navigation, power tailgate, proximity keyless entry, Adaptive Cruise Control with queue assist, Collision Warning with auto-brake, Pedestrian Detection, Blind Spot Information System, and Lane Departure Warning. Nearly 9 inches of ground clearance and over 67 cubic feet of cargo with rear seats folded.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3-Month 'Peace of Mind' Warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on-the-spot drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. Same-day appointments available call or stop by today.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2016 Volvo V60 Cross Country
item.g:description: 2016 Volvo V60 Cross Country T5, Adventure ready and great everyday driver. An AWD wagon with a turbocharged 2.5L engine, heated leather seats, a heated steering wheel, and a sunroof. Yakima RoofRacks and extras. Black on a black leather interior with a smooth automatic. Built for drivers who want all weather grip and real wagon space without stepping up to a full size SUV. Even with standard all wheel drive, it stays easy on gas at up to 28 mpg on the highway.Key features: AWD with a turbocharged 2.5L engine, leather seating, heated front seats and heated steering wheel, sunroof, navigation, blind spot monitor, lane departure warning, memory driver seat, power seats, rear parking sensors, full roof rack, backup camera, smart key entry, Bluetooth, and alloy wheels. The Cross Country trim adds raised ground clearance and rugged body cladding, so you get confident traction through Chicago winters with the cargo room and ride comfort of a wagon.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3 Month Peace of Mind Warranty, with extended coverage availableMetal plates issued same day so you can drive home todayTransparent pricing with no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call us to set up a time to see this Volvo.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Dual Power Seats,Power Door Locks,Navigation System,High Performance Radio,5-Cyl Turbo 2.5 Liter,Keyless Entry,Side Air Bags,Traction Control,Rear Spoiler,Dual Air Bags,Cruise Control,Alarm System,SiriusXM Satellite,Backup Camera,Power Steering,Hill Descent Control,Keyless Drive,Rear Park Assist,ABS (4-Wheel),Moon Roof,Daytime Running Lights,Air Conditioning,Bluetooth Wireless,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Power Windows,Leather,AWD,Volvo Sensus,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Alloy Wheels,Dynamic Stability Control,AM/FM Stereo,Auto 6-Spd Gtrnc Adpshft

item.g:title: 2016 Honda CR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2016 Honda CR-V LX Remote Start, cooled down by the time you enter, AWD, Backup Cam, legendary reliability. Silver on charcoal , automatic, 2.4L. A family SUV ready for Chicago summer road trips and year-round commuting in the suburbs. Great on gas for an SUV, returning up to 31 mpg on the highway.Key features: 4WD, Honda's bulletproof 2.4L engine, automatic transmission, sport utility 4-door configuration, A/C, power windows and locks, cruise control. Practical cargo space and rear-seat room perfect first family car or commuter.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicle3-Month 'Peace of Mind' Warranty (extended coverage available)Metal plates issued on-the-spot drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area.
